title: CSIR NEIST Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Multi-Tasking Staff and Driver Posts
description: CSIR - North East Institute of Science & Technology (CSIR NEIST) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 10 Multi-Tasking Staff and Driver Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass or 12th Pass can grab this chance and apply for these posts. Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for the CSIR NEIST Notification 2026 .
